'''Korad''' was a [[Planet/Legends|planet]] in [[Elrood sector/Legends|Elrood sector]] on the [[Elrood-Derilyn Trade Route]]. It was covered with [[Starship/Legends|starship]] and vehicle wrecks and was, in essence, a massive salvage yard operated during the [[Old Republic era]] by a corporation called [[Renew]] which eventually went bankrupt. During the [[Rebellion era]] many refugees and scavengers inhabited the planet. It was the [[Homeworld/Legends|homeworld]] of [[Slythor]], a [[Squib/Legends|Squib]] crime lord.

==Description==
There was a small automated landing pad on the planet's north pole that was serviceable for repairing minor ship damage.
Circling the planet's circumference like a natural space ring was a band of scrapped vessels, many dating back to the Old Republic. The barren surface was littered with wrecks, ranging from [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighters]], to [[Freighter/Legends|freighters]], to [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] vehicles, to old [[Droid/Legends|droids]], to old [[Landspeeder/Legends|landspeeders]]. The atmosphere was thick with the odor of leaking fluids from the wrecks, spilled chemicals and the like and required a [[Breath mask/Legends|breather mask]].
